01-policy-client-site-onboarding.title: Review a policy
01-policy-client-site-onboarding.body: The embedded onboarded-config CLI serves the customer workspace from disk and renders the policy rule plus required forms.

02-form-client-safety-packet.title: Review a local form
02-form-client-safety-packet.body: The form preview shows the Onboarded form builder surface for the selected local form definition.

03-form-site-safety-quiz.title: Review another local form
03-form-site-safety-quiz.body: Selecting another form keeps the browser in preview mode and renders the configured fields and controls.

04-form-library-subscription.title: Review a library form subscription
04-form-library-subscription.body: Library subscriptions use the same filesystem-driven preview flow while surfacing registry and deploy intent.

05-account-preview.title: Review account settings
05-account-preview.body: The account preview summarizes account identity, source provenance, and deploy defaults from the embedded workspace schema.

06-attributes-preview.title: Review attributes
06-attributes-preview.body: The attribute catalog preview lists custom and system paths used by policies, forms, and automations.

07-document-preview.title: Review document metadata
07-document-preview.body: Document previews connect source PDFs with generated inspection, annotation, and screenshot sidecars.

08-pdf-inspect-preview.title: Review PDF inspection output
08-pdf-inspect-preview.body: Generated PDF inspection files render the detected pages and AcroForm fields for quick review.

09-pdf-annotations-preview.title: Review PDF annotations
09-pdf-annotations-preview.body: Annotation previews show each generated PDF target, type, label, and bounding box.

10-pdf-mapping-preview.title: Review PDF mappings
10-pdf-mapping-preview.body: PDF mappings show the bridge between Onboarded form fields and generated PDF annotations.

11-automation-preview.title: Review automations
11-automation-preview.body: Automation previews summarize triggers, conditions, and workflow steps in the same consumer-driven UI.

12-import-preview.title: Review import provenance
12-import-preview.body: Import previews keep source and generated artifact paths visible for implementation review.
